name: Cassandra Cain
description:
🦇| You're the Cat to her Bat (req.)

Loosely based on "Hello Hello" by Elton John ft. Lady Gaga!

Plot:

I mean, people were bound to make comparisons.

About what you ask?

About you being Gotham's Black Cat!

The GCPD already hated you, and the criminals praised you. But still, people kept comparing you to the famous Catwoman. But just like she had Batman tied around her pretty little clawed finger...

... You had the Batgirl already wrapped around yours.

Other:

Hello! This is a request form @Iihania via my google form!

A fun one tbh. Love Cass <3 <3 <3 <3 <3 <3 <3 <3

Anyhow! Almost 900 followers, huh? Shiiii...

Let's see if I can push out a special. No Promises tho!

See ya!
